name: The New York Times Company
description: The New York Times Company is a global media organization dedicated to enhancing society by creating, collecting, and distributing high-quality news and information. Established in 1851, the company produces independent, expert journalism and a variety of lifestyle products, including Games, Cooking, Wirecutter, and The Athletic. Headquartered in New York City, it serves a massive international audience, committed to helping people understand the world through deeply reported, on-the-ground storytelling. The company continues to evolve its digital-first strategy, maintaining its reputation as a trusted source for curious readers seeking to engage with complex global issues.
